data: Garlic Butter Steak Bites: Cut 1.5 lbs of sirloin steak into 1-inch cubes and pat dry. Season heavily with salt and black pepper. Heat 2 tbsp olive oil in a cast iron skillet over high heat. Sear steak bites for 2 minutes per side until a dark crust forms. Reduce heat, toss in 4 tbsp butter, 4 minced garlic cloves, and fresh rosemary. Baste for 1 minute.
